nasb.text: The signs of a true apostle were performed among you with all perseverance, by signs and wonders and miracles.

esv.text: The signs of a true apostle were performed among you with utmost patience, with signs and wonders and mighty works.

cnv.text: 我在你們中間，以各種忍耐，用神蹟、奇事和大能，作為使徒的憑據。

ccb.text: 我在你们中间百般地忍耐，用神迹、奇事、异能证明自己是使徒。

csbs.text: 我在你们中间以极大的忍耐，用神迹、奇事和大能，确实显出了使徒的标记。
